case_title: BRUCE CUTHBERTSON RESPONDENT VS. DUFFY, MATTHEW DBA DUFFY MEDIA APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2005 - JUDGMENT AWARDED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT BRUCE CUTHBERTSON AND AGAINST DEFENDANT/APPELLANT MATTHEW DUFFY DBA DUFFY MEDIA IN THE PRINCIPAL SUM OF $5,000.00, PLUS COSTS IN THE SUM OF $91.50, FOR A TOTAL AWARD OF $5,091.50. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Cause comes on for Small Claims Appeal trial de novo.
Appearances: Bruce Cuthbertson, Plaintiff/Respondent and his counsel Joseph M. Breall; Matt Duffy, Defendant/Appellant, in pro per.
The Clerk administers the oath to both parties, who present oral and documentary evidence to the Court.
The Court takes the matter under submission.
The Court awards judgment in favor of Plaintiff/Respondent Bruce Cuthbertson and against Defendant/Appellant Matthew Duffy dba Duffy Media in the principal sum of $5,000.00, plus costs in the sumn of $91.50, for a total award of $5,091.50.
Judge: Sharon O'Grady, Judge Pro Tem; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; not reported (D. 525)
